source: Apply some power to get moving.

source: Apply the brakes to come to a stop at Station One. Don't worry if you miss the stop as you are on a loop and can continue around as many times as required to get it right.
target: 施加制动以停在 1 号站台。如果你错过了停车点也不用担心，你现在处于环线上，可以根据需要继续绕行多次，直到操作正确。

source: Apply the brakes to come to a stop at Station One. Don't worry if you miss the stop as you are on a loop and can continue around as many times as required to get it right.
target: 施加制动以停在 1 号站台。如果你错过了停车点也不用担心，你现在处于环线上，可以根据需要继续绕行多次，直到操作正确。

source: Are you in again? You're here more than I am! You'll doubtless be happy to know we've had a unit failure at Tonbridge so we need you to take this 375 down as a replacement. It's a bit breezy, but keep an eye out. I'll bet the Medway will be looking not far off it's best today.
target: 你又来了？你在这待的时间比我还长！你肯定很高兴知道汤布里奇有一组列车故障了，所以我们需要你把这列 375 型电力动车组开下去作为替代。虽然风有点大，但要留意观察。我敢打赌今天的梅德韦景色一定非常迷人。

source: As much of a pain as that was, I'll bet the Medway looked pretty stunning...A Winter Wonderland eh? Go and grab a warm drink whilst you wait for your next service, and well done again.
target: 尽管刚才的过程很辛苦，但我敢打赌梅德韦的景色一定很美……简直是冬日仙境对吧？去喝杯热饮休息一下等待下一班车，再次做得好。

source: Explore the rural Kent countryside aboard the Southeastern Class 375/3, which have run on the line since 2012, with Southeastern themselves having operated since 2006. The Medway Valley Line also sees rush hour Highspeed services and is a key link for freight and engineers trains.
target: 乘坐 Southeastern 375/3 型电力动车组探索肯特郡的乡村。该车型自 2012 年起就在该线路上运行，而 Southeastern 公司自 2006 年起就开始运营该线路。梅德韦河谷线也运行高峰期的东南高速列车，并且是货运和工程列车的重要纽带。

source: Hi driver. Bad news I'm afraid, the points ahead are frozen. The only option is to deboard the passengers here, then you'll have to shunt to Platform2. We'll get them over the bridge whilst you're doing that, then you can continue on your way. It's just one of those days isn't it?! Let's get them off the train so you can crack on.
target: 嘿，司机。恐怕有个坏消息，前方的道岔冻住了。唯一的办法是在这里让乘客下车，然后您必须调车前往 2 号站台。在您调车时我们会引导他们过天桥，然后您就可以继续行程了。这就是那种倒霉日子，对吧？！让我们先把乘客疏散，以便您能继续工作。

source: Hi there. I'm sure you're already aware but 2T42 is running very late indeed. When the service pulls in we need a quick changeover so you can get on your way. Important to note you're now express to Strood, stopping only at Maidstone West. Safety first obviously, but any time you can regain will help us later in the day. It should be in soon, good luck.
target: 你好。我肯定你已经知道了，2T42 次严重晚点。当列车进站时，我们需要快速换班以便你能出发。注意你现在的车次是直达斯特鲁德的快车，中途只停靠梅德斯通西站。当然安全第一，但你挽回的任何时间都会对当天的后续运行有所帮助。列车很快就进站了，祝好运。

source: Morning driver, don't you just love the rain? No? Me neither. Anyway, make your way over to Jubilee Sidings to get sorted out and set up for today.
target: 早安，司机。你不喜欢下雨吗？不喜欢？我也不喜欢。总之，请前往银禧侧线进行准备，为今天的工作做好打算。

source: Morning driver, how's it going? You're aware of your job today I gather, It's an end-to-end return track inspection on the Medway Valley. The weather could have been better but it is what it is, you can still get the job done. The engineers haven't had chance yet so remember, before you go, you need to attach the camera. Have a good one and we'll see you back here later on. Cheerio.
target: 早安，司机。近来可好？我想你已经清楚今天的任务了，是在梅德韦河谷线上进行全程往返轨道检查。天气本可以更好，但现实如此，你仍需完成任务。工程师们还没腾出手来，所以记住，在出发前你需要安装摄像头。祝你顺利，晚点在此见。再见。

source: Morning driver. What a night we've had! This snow isn't showing any signs of letting up and the forecast is for it to get worse throughout the day. Anyway, on to brighter things, lucky you!! You've got the first train out of Jubilee Sidings as the points have been frozen all night. We're having to double up, so you're in a 6 car 375/3 all the way to Strood. Be mindful of your stopping points and keep an eye out, you're the first northbound service up the Medway Valley today.
target: 早安，司机。昨晚真是够呛！这场雪一点停的意思都没有，预报说全天天气还会恶化。不管怎样，说点高兴的，你运气不错！！由于道岔整晚都被冻住了，你将驾驶从银禧侧线发出的首班车。我们要进行重联运行，所以你将驾驶一列 6 节编组的 375/3 型动车组一路前往斯特鲁德。注意你的停车点并保持警惕，你是今天梅德韦河谷线第一班北行的列车。

target: 在任何可用座位就坐

source: Take a short journey along the Medway Valley, and learn what it has to offer.
target: 沿着梅德韦河谷线进行一段简短的旅程，了解它所提供的一切。

source: Take this ECS move down to Paddock Wood, keep an eye out for trouble.
target: 将这列空客车移至帕多克伍德，留意突发状况。
Thameslink 班次

source: The Medway Valley Line was completed in two stages. The first opened in 1847 and connected Maidstone to the South Eastern Railway (SER) at Paddock Wood, followed by the extension to Strood in 1856. As its name suggests, the tracks closely follow the path of the River Medway for almost its entire length.
target: 梅德韦河谷线分两个阶段建成。第一阶段于 1847 年开通，将梅德斯通与位于帕多克伍德的东南铁路 (SER) 相连，随后于 1856 年延伸至斯特鲁德。顾名思义，轨道几乎全程紧贴梅德韦河的路径。

source: The Medway Valley Line was completed in two stages. The first opened in 1847 and connected Maidstone to the South Eastern Railway (SER) at Paddock Wood, followed by the extension to Strood in 1856. As its name suggests, the tracks closely follow the path of the River Medway for almost its entire length.
target: 梅德韦河谷线分两个阶段建成。第一阶段于 1847 年开通，将梅德斯通与位于帕多克伍德的东南铁路 (SER) 相连，随后于 1856 年延伸至斯特鲁德。顾名思义，轨道几乎全程紧贴梅德韦河的路径。

source: The line features several unique quirks. The semaphore signalling was replaced in the 2000s but the locally staffed signalboxes remain to this day. There are grade-listed buildings and structures across its entire length, including an abundance of old Kentish Oast Houses - a glimpse into the line's hop-brewing past. The line's scenic nature means there are many footcrossings too, resulting in a high concentration of whistle boards.
target: 该线路具有几个独特的特点。臂板信号机在 21 世纪初被取代，但由当地人员值守的信号楼保留至今。整条线路都有分级保护的建筑和结构，包括大量的肯特郡旧式啤酒花干燥室——这是该线路过去酿造啤酒花历史的缩影。该线路的风景优美，意味着还有许多人行道口，导致鸣笛牌非常密集。

source: The track and lineside infrastructure along the Medway Valley is overdue a check-up. Drive this empty 375 with a track monitoring camera attached to gather the needed data.
target: 梅德韦河谷线沿线的轨道和路旁基础设施早已逾期未检。驾驶这辆装有轨道监控摄像头的空载 375 型动车组以收集所需数据。

source: To build up your knowledge and experience, let's do some night runs while it is quiet.
target: 为了增长你的知识和经验，让我们趁着夜深人静时进行一些夜间运行。

source: Welcome back driver, how was it? Not too slippery I hope? Excellent job anyway, that should give us all the data we need, we'll get that off to the engineers as soon as we can. A good job well done I'd say. I've got to get on now, I'll catch you later.
target: 欢迎回来，司机，情况如何？希望轨道不太滑？干得好，这些数据已经足够了，我们会尽快交给工程师。我认为这是一次出色的任务。我现在得走了，回头见。

source: Welcome to the Medway Valley, let's get started.
target: 欢迎来到梅德韦谷，我们开始吧。

source: Well done completeling the chapter, you now have some experience under your belt. The Medway Valley is very pretty at night isn't it?
target: 恭喜完成本章，你现在已经积累了一些经验。梅德韦谷的夜晚非常漂亮，不是吗？

source: Well, you don't see that very often! Have you experienced many emergency stops before? I've only ever seen the one myself. Anyway, great job responding to it and keeping everyone safe. Looks like you'll be here for a while, getting those sheep rounded up and accounted for will be no small job. No doubt you'll have some paperwork to do so I'll leave you to it...
target: 哈，这可不常见！你以前经历过多次紧急制动吗？我自己只见过一次。无论如何，你应对得很好，确保了每个人的安全。看来你得在这里待一会儿了，把那些羊群聚拢并清点完毕可不是件小事。毫无疑问你还要写些报告，我就不打扰你了……
